title: v3 layered runtime (raster + scene engine)
description: Breaking redesign: L0 Pixoo transport, L1 RasterClient, L2 ScenePlayer with transitions and scene-first clock migration.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementation landed for v3 layered runtime modules, CLI surface, scene-first clock integration, docs, and automated tests. Manual device acceptance remains.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Automated validation complete: 91 targeted pytest tests passing for v3 modules/CLI plus legacy coverage tests; Sphinx HTML build succeeds. Pending real-device manual acceptance before epic closure.
